# Signal AI Agency
> Signal AI Agency helps independent Brooklyn businesses get cited by AI search engines. We build GEO-optimized websites with Schema.org markup and run weekly content engines.

## Services
- GEO-optimized website builds
- Schema.org / JSON-LD implementation
- Google Business Profile optimization
- Weekly AI-search content publishing
- Monthly AI visibility reporting

## Case Studies
- Nostrand Optical: nostrandoptical.com
- Brooklyn BJJ Lessons: brooklynbjjlessons.com

## Journal
- https://www.signalai.agency/journal.html
